templates: Namaste {debtor_name}, {merchant_name} ki taraf se yaad dila raha hoon ki Rs {amount} baaki hai. Jab convenient ho, ye link se bhej dijiye: {payment_link} 🙏
{debtor_name}, aapka Rs {amount} pending hai {merchant_name} ki shop pe. Koi jaldi nahi, jab ho sake tab bhej dena: {payment_link}
Namaste {debtor_name}! Bas ek chhoti si yaad — Rs {amount} baaki hai. Ye link se turant bhej sakte hain: {payment_link} 😊

polite_follow_up.description: Second reminder, still polite but more direct
templates: {debtor_name}, pichli baar yaad dilaya tha — Rs {amount} abhi bhi pending hai. Agar convenient ho toh aaj hi bhej dijiye: {payment_link}
Namaste {debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ka payment {days_overdue} din se pending hai. Request hai ki jaldi se jaldi settle kar dijiye: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, aapke account mein Rs {amount} pending hai. Ye Paytm link se ek minute mein bhej sakte hain: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ka payment {days_overdue} din se pending hai. Kripya jaldi bhejiye. Link: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, aapka Rs {amount} kaafi time se baaki hai. Aaj settle karna possible hai? Link: {payment_link}
Namaste {debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ki pending payment ke baare mein baat karni thi. {days_overdue} din ho gaye. Please ye link use karein: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, ye important message hai — Rs {amount} bahut time se pending hai ({days_overdue} din). Aaj settle karna zaroori hai. Link: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ka payment abhi tak nahi aaya. {merchant_name} ko ye amount ki zaroorat hai. Please aaj hi bhejiye: {payment_link}
Namaste {debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ka final reminder hai. Agar koi issue hai toh bataiye, warna aaj settle kar dijiye: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, Rs {amount} ke baare mein kai baar yaad dilaya. Ab {merchant_owner} ji ko directly baat karni padegi. Agar abhi settle karna chahein: {payment_link}
{debtor_name}, ye last reminder hai Rs {amount} ke liye. {days_overdue} din ho gaye. {merchant_owner} ji aapse personally baat karenge agar settle nahi hua. Link: {payment_link}

winback_templates: {customer_name}, bahut din ho gaye aapko dekhe nahi! {merchant_name} mein nayi collection aayi hai. Aapke liye special {discount}% discount 🎉 Aayiye na!
Namaste {customer_name}! {merchant_name} mein aapke liye kuch special rakha hai. {discount}% off sirf aapke liye, {validity} tak. Zaroor aayiye!
{customer_name}, aapki kami mehsoos ho rahi hai {merchant_name} mein! Ek baar aayiye, {discount}% discount aapka wait kar raha hai 😊
